temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a middle-aged man with short, graying hair. He wears a light-colored collared shirt under a gray suit jacket. His expression is somber and concerned as he looks slightly off-camera. The setting is dimly lit with a cool, greenish-blue color tone, suggesting an indoor location at night. In the dark background, a window with bars and a red and green object hanging on the wall are faintly visible. White Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed in the upper left corner of the screen. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's subtle movements and shifting gaze. The audio opens with a tense, rhythmic, and percussive musical score, creating a suspenseful and serious atmosphere. A man speaks in a low, serious, and slightly weary tone, his voice filled with a sense of urgency and concern as he says, "帮我照顾他们" (Help me take care of them). The scene cuts to a view from behind a man looking through a barred window. The man in the foreground is out of focus, while the man in the background, wearing a dark jacket, is seen in profile, looking down. The shot is framed by the metal bars of the window, which create a sense of confinement and observation. The lighting remains dark and moody, consistent with the previous shot. The white Chinese text, "风行网," is still visible in the upper left corner. The camera is static, maintaining a steady focus on the man looking through the bars.
